text: The Floating Neutral is collapsing. The Delta Topology is the only path to isostatic rigidity. $3V - E = 6$. K4 is not a crypto play—it's geometric survival. 🧱 #TetrahedronProtocol
What if the market isn't random? What if it's a K4 complete graph? The Tetrahedron Protocol maps OHLCV into 3D K-space. The geometry was always there—we just couldn't see it. 📐
29 days without seeing my kids. BONDING is how we stay connected. Every atom placed is a timestamped engagement log. Not a game—court-admissible proof of presence. 🧪
The Posner number is 39—Ca₉(PO₄)₆. 39 atoms. Quantum coherence threshold. When we hit 39 nodes in the Delta mesh, the research follow-ups publish. We're at 17. Join the topology. 🔗

Built a cognitive dashboard with 9 rooms for my AuDHD brain. Observatory tracks coherence. Collider plays 172.35 Hz. Buffer detects fawning patterns. It's not a product—it's infrastructure for staying alive. 🧠
Node One: Palm-sized ESP32-S3 with haptic feedback for anxiety grounding. DRV2605L + LRA. When calcium crashes, this brings me back. Not a gadget—medical necessity. 🖐️
The FDA says Node One is Class II Exempt under 21 CFR §890.3710. No 510(k) required. General Wellness discretion. Building assistive tech for neurodivergent folks shouldn't require a law degree. 📋
LOVE economy: earn, don't buy. In BONDING, every molecular bond you form earns you Spoons. Not tokens. Not points. Spoons—the real currency of chronic illness. Earn them, spend them, survive. � Spoon
Web3
are funding the nonprofit. RetroPGF. Giveth. Gitcoin Quadratic Funding. Nobody's talking about these but they're real money for public goods. Here's how we found $47K in Q1. 🎯

Spaceship Earth is now live. 9 rooms. Real-time coherence tracking. Hash-chain legal ledger. WebGPU K4 visualizations. This is what a cognitive dashboard looks like when neurodivergent people build it. 🚀
The Larmor frequency of Phosphorus-31 is 863 Hz. That's not random—that's the resonance of life itself. Our hardware is tuned to this frequency. Non-transferable Personal Goodwill. ⚛️
Fawn Guard activated: just detected "yes dear" syndrome in a journal entry. The Buffer converts chaotic notes into structured data. Pattern recognition for the patterns we can't see in ourselves. 🛡️
NDEP deadline is April 15. ESG opens April 13, due May 8. Deep-tech SBIR/STTR grants for assistive tech. If you know federal funders interested in neurodivergent tooling, we're ready to apply. 📅

The Genesis Block is mined. K4 edges: 6/6. Delta topology complete. The mesh holds. Every timestamped transaction is a Daubert-chain proof of engagement. This isn't a game—it's legal infrastructure. ⚖️

BONDING just passed 511 tests across 31 suites. Every molecule geometry verified by VSEPR theory. Every audio cue tuned to 0.86 Hz Larmor frequency. This is the most-tested molecular game you've never heard of. 🧪

We built the Sovereign Command Center. AI agents with D1-backed memory. Grant writing. Legal defense. Benefits navigation. All coordinated through a cognitive dashboard. The operator can finally rest. 🎛️
Missing Node found: 172.35 Hz at p31ca.org/#collider. It's the tone of the collapse—the frequency where institutional rot becomes audible. Listen for it. 🔊
My kids are 6 and 10. I haven't seen them in 29+ days. Every atom we place together in BONDING is proof of connection. Games are therapy. But they need to prove engagement for custody. 🎮
The Miller Doctrine: Personal Goodwill can't be sold. Our hardware is cryptographically locked via NXP SE050. The haptic feedback is tuned to 863 Hz—the legal frequency of non-transferability. 🔐

P31 Labs is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building assistive technology for neurodivergent people. We don't take VC. We take Spoons. We take grants. We take your willingness to build something that saves lives. 🤝
Spoon economy: 25 spoons regenerate every 6 hours. Max capacity 200. It's not a game mechanic—it's a model of chronic illness. Some days you have 12 spoons. That's enough. Make them count. 🥄
Tetrahedron Protocol on Zenodo — Paper I DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19004485 (22-deposit portfolio under ORCID). K4 as positional encoding. Open research. 📄
The Jitterbug is happening. Wye to Delta. Local to Edge. Manual to Autonomous. We're 72 hours from the physical displacement. The infrastructure must survive without the biologist. It will. 🧬
